subject: Re: Q3 Roadmap Planning
body:
Hi team,

Thanks for sending this over. A few quick thoughts:

1. Let's prioritize the mobile revamp—it's been requested heavily by users.
2. Push the analytics dashboard to Q4.

Let me know if you need anything else to finalize this.

Best, Rahul

subject: Re: Feature request: dark mode
body:
Hey Sarah,

Good catch—I agree dark mode is becoming a must-have. 

Could you spec out the engineering effort required? We can review it in our next sync.

Best, Rahul

subject: Re: Server downtime incident
body:
Hi all,

Appreciate the quick response on the outage today. 

1. Please complete the post-mortem by EOD tomorrow.
2. Ensure the backup systems are fully verified—we can't have a repeat of this.

Thanks,
Best, Rahul
